code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut out = ""
mut i = 0
mut first = true
while i < tokens.len()
  let tok = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    t
  when None
    ""
  end
  if first
    out = "#{tok} #{tok}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{tok} #{tok}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println(out)
